payload.answer: Slack is the sole guardrailed memory ingestion interface for Brain. Telegram ingestion is deferred unless escalation conditions are met. No superseded/deleted facts are presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: Deferred channels (e.g., Telegram) lack current operational constraints; ambiguity is retained to avoid premature commitment.

memory_cards.statement: Slack must remain the primary guardrailed memory ingestion interface for Brain. All other channels (e.g., Telegram) are deferred to future phases unless explicitly approved via escalation.
Telegram ingestion may proceed only if: (1) Slack capacity is saturated, (2) explicit approval from project lead is obtained, or (3) a formal phase-gate review is completed.

details: Durable memory committed: Slack as primary ingestion channel.
Ambiguity preserved: Telegram status remains deferred with escalation paths.

repair_options: Escalate to project lead for Telegram ingestion approval
Document Slack capacity metrics to justify potential Telegram activation
Schedule phase-gate review for deferred channels
